ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application (e.g., Cooking, Heating) */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of energy consumption */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the energy was consumed (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific device or appliance that consumed the energy */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of energy consumption (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the energy consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the application (e.g., cooking, heating, lighting) */,
  "average_consumption" REAL /* Average energy consumption for the application */,
  "peak_consumption" REAL /* Peak energy consumption for the application */,
  "efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Efficiency rating of the application (e.g., energy star rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "persons_in_household" INTEGER /* Number of persons in the household */,
  "household_address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the household */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the household */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "household_size_category" TEXT /* Household size category (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the household */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the household members */,
  "occupancy_status" TEXT /* Occupancy status (e.g., owner-occupied, rented) */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of the building (e.g., Single Family, Apartment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the building */,
  "number_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "building_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., MWh/a) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy consumption record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES energy_consumption ("consumption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generate_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household receiving the recommendation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application related to the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "savings_estimation" REAL /* Estimated savings from implementing the recommendation */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of the savings estimation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date by which the recommendation should be implemented */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for a follow-up review of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
